introductoryCutscene.text: Initialized dialogue extension./p Press Z to continue./eWelcome-/l to Exelsior's World./eBut you may be wondering, just what kind of world is this?/eSome may call it ugly, or wrong, or cruel./p./p./l however.../eThe ruler of this world would beg to differ. They say these opinions are void, that their world is objectively perfect as is./eMany say beauty is in the eye of the beholder, but can the beholder alter the meaning of beauty?/eThat is for you to decide./p but for now./p./p./e/rYou must work./n/e/!00

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc00Interact00.text: My bed./p Not very comfortable, but it serves its purpose./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc00Interact01.text: Behind the bars is a wide hallway./p How long it goes, I could never say./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc00Interact011.text: I've never been outside this room before./l Well,/p at least not while I'm conscious./eApparently every now and then they take us out for health inspection and cleaning while we sleep./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc00Interact02.text: Personal belongings, such as some clothes and fidgets./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc00Interact03.text: Food comes from here./p Sometimes I'll also get new clothes./eI'm pretty hungry, but it seems as if they're short on food for today./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc00Interact04.text: I don't need to go right now./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc00Interact05.text: I probably need to be at work soon./p./p. Time to put this thing on./l Again./e/!01

sc00Interact051.text: Almost on command,/p the machinery begins to wake up./lAnd,/p through the headset, you begin to make out a familiar setting./e/!02

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc01Cutscene.text: Gee, my head hurts.../eI'll try to log off early today, I suppose./l But here we are./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc01Interact00.text: I could change my appearance with this box if I wanted, but there's not much point./e

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc01Interact01.text: There's some games on this thing, I guess./eMaybe if I feel a bit better later today I'll entertain them, /pbut for now I need to get to work!

speaker: OPERATOR0040
sc01Interact02.text: Some assorted gadgets./l Not much use since work gives me all the tools I'd ever need./e
